Package recoder.convenience

Class TaggedComment

java.lang.Object
recoder.convenience.TaggedComment
@Deprecated public class TaggedComment extends Object
Deprecated.
This class will be integrated into DocComment.
this class represents a java style structured comment. Such a comment has an introductionary description and a list of tagged descriptions.

  • Field Details

    • rawComment

      protected final String rawComment
      Deprecated.
      the raw (unparsed) comment string.

    • analyzed

      protected boolean analyzed
      Deprecated.
      indicates that the comment has been analyzed

    • introText

      protected String introText
      Deprecated.
      the introductionary comment lines without comment characters.

    • tagNames

      protected Vector tagNames
      Deprecated.
      the tags contained in the comment. This is required to obtain the order in which the tags occur

    • tagValues

      protected Properties tagValues
      Deprecated.
      the tags and their string values. Tags are stored without the leading @ sign

  • Constructor Details

    • TaggedComment

      public TaggedComment(String comment)
      Deprecated.
      creates a new instance from the given string. The given string must not be null!
      Parameters:
      comment - the string containing the comment

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Deprecated.
      simple test method for this class

    • stripCommentChars

      protected String stripCommentChars(String line)
      Deprecated.
      strips comment characters from the beginning and end of the given string representing a single line.
      Parameters:
      line - the string representing the line. The line is assumed to be non empty.
      Returns:
      the stripped and trimmed string

    • parseRawComment

      protected void parseRawComment()
      Deprecated.
      parses the raw comment string and computes the intro and tag values.

    • getIntro

      public String getIntro()
      Deprecated.
      returns the introductionary text of the comment. This is the text starting at the beginning of the comment to the first tag.
      Returns:
      the intro of the comment

    • hasTags

      public boolean hasTags()
      Deprecated.
      determines whether or not there are tags contained in the underlying comment.
      Returns:
      true iff the comment contains tags

    • getTagCount

      public int getTagCount()
      Deprecated.
      determines the number of tags in the underlying comment
      Returns:
      the number of tags specified in the comment

    • getTags

      public Enumeration getTags()
      Deprecated.
      return an enumeration of tags contained in the comment in order of their apperance in the comment.
      Returns:
      an non-empty enumeration object.

    • getTagValue

      public String getTagValue(String tag)
      Deprecated.
      returns the text for the given tag or null if that tag is not defined.
      Parameters:
      tag - the name of the tag
      Returns:
      the value of that tag or null
